name: Extra Veiler
name_jp: エクストラ・ヴェーラー
desc: When your opponent Special Summons a monster(s), except during the Damage Step: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, your opponent takes any effect damage you would have taken from their card effects this turn, instead.
mnst_eff: When your opponent Special Summons a monster(s), except during the Damage Step: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, your opponent takes any effect damage you would have taken from their card effects this turn, instead.
eff: When your opponent Special Summons a monster(s), except during the Damage Step: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, your opponent takes any effect damage you would have taken from their card effects this turn, instead.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
